evidence_rows.reading: V1.4 opened lawfully as consumption work, not as a modeling or signal phase.
Bounded report-only discrimination can exist without justifying promotion or strategy integration.

interpretation: V1.4 has now shown whether bounded context consumption produces directional discrimination beyond protocol and schema design.
Even with positive bounded discrimination, the branch remains below promotion threshold and cannot open local-model or strategy work automatically.
The next legal move is a closure/candidacy decision, not uncontrolled expansion.
